name: Comarch ERP Optima Bridge
summary: Planned Comarch ERP Optima connector for ERP/accounting handoff where customers can expose a supported API or local bridge.
description: Added because Marketing identifies marketplace -> ERP/accounting and invoice completeness checks as monetizable. Public Comarch materials show API and integration surfaces around Optima/OCR/BPM, but a generic, public Optima REST API for stock/order writes is not confirmed here. Therefore this connector is planned with VALIDATE FIRST: first confirm customer deployment model, partner API access and whether a local bridge is required.
useCases: Check whether marketplace orders have corresponding accounting documents.
Compare Optima stock/product data with BaseLinker inventory.
Use a customer-approved bridge rather than assuming a universal cloud API.
